_comment: Board wiring data — the Autonomous equivalent of a Linux DTS / Android BoardConfig. Adding a board = one entry here, no code change. Loaded by board.py into typed BoardProfile structs. `match` = lowercased substrings tested against /proc/device-tree/model (first match wins, file order); keep them non-overlapping. `led.transport` = spi|pwm. `default_board` is used when the model is unknown/unreadable.
